guion_padre.introduccion: Welcome to Lesson 7. Today we will explore some wonderful sounds.
guion_padre.instruccion_g: Point to the big G and say: gggggg. Keep the sound going!
guion_padre.instruccion_h: Now point to the big H and say: hhhhhh.

parent_story: A happy goat wearing a tall hat ran to a big house. Hooray, it is dinner time!
